meaning: adj.譛ｪ謚･蜻顔噪 豐｡譛画冠驕鍋噪,譛ｪ扈乗冠驕鍋噪
examples: Many cases of bullying go unreported.
Police are worried that many crimes go unreported.
Almost 90 percent of all rapes and violent assaults went unreported.
Many attacks against gypsies go unreported because the victims distrust or fear the police.
Experts say it is impossible to know the exact number because many kidnappings go unreported.
